song_name: Case Of The Ex Whatcha Gonna Do
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
It's after midnight and she's on your phone[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]G#[/ch]
Saying come over 'cause she's all alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
I could tell it was your ex by your tone[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]G#[/ch]
Why is she calling now after so long?[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]
Now what is it that she wants?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]G#[/ch]
Tell me what is it that she needs?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                                  [ch]G#[/ch]
Did she hear about the brand new Benz that you just bought for me?[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]
'Cause y'all didn't have no kids[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]G#[/ch]
Didn't share no mutual friends[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
And you told me that she turned trick[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#[/ch]
When y'all broke up in 96[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
What you gonna do when you can't say no?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
When the feelings start to show[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]A[/ch]
Boy, I really need to know, and[/tab]

How you gonna act? How you gonna handle that?
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
What you gonna do when she wants you back?[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
What you gonna do when you can't say no?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
When the feelings start to show[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]A[/ch]
Boy, I really need to know, and[/tab]

How you gonna act? How you gonna handle that?
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
What you gonna do when she wants you back?[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
There's no need to reminisce 'bout the past[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]G#[/ch]
Obviously 'cause that shit did not last[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C#m[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
I know how a woman will try to game you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]G#[/ch]
Don't get caught up because baby, you'll lose[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]
Now what is it that she wants?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]G#[/ch]
Tell me what is it that she needs?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                                  [ch]G#[/ch]
Did she hear about the brand new Benz that you just bought for me?[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]
'Cause y'all didn't have no kids[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]G#[/ch]
Didn't share no mutual friends[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
And you told me that she turned trick[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#[/ch]
When y'all broke up in 96[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
What you gonna do when you can't say no?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
When the feelings start to show[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]A[/ch]
Boy, I really need to know, and[/tab]

How you gonna act? How you gonna handle that?
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
What you gonna do when she wants you back?[/tab]

[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
What you gonna do when you can't say no?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
When the feelings start to show[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]A[/ch]
Boy, I really need to know, and[/tab]

How you gonna act? How you gonna handle that?
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
What you gonna do when she wants you back?[/tab]
